/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & ACM ELIG RPT/DAWT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/X:DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN IN TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT 360 AT ALL TIMES//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: STATUS OF PROGRAM/X:DAW IF IN PROGRAM/
